title: calyptrotheca taitensis
intro: Calyptrotheca taitensis, also known as the Taita daisy, is a flowering plant species native to East Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Calyptrotheca taitensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
